title: Yijing Hexagram 26: Da Chu (Taming Power of the Great)
description: Hexagram 26 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 26 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: The Taming Power of the Great. Perseverance furthers. Not eating at home brings good fortune.
